_comment: 《铃兰穿越记》第006集(arc-01/006 疤痕危机)。头钩=E05尾钩:疤被追问→小桃圆场'落水时撞的'。后怕:这身体处处是雷。深夜翻原主梳妆台→烧了一半的照片。尾钩:背面一行她读不懂的字。连戏:白天=红嫁衣延续E05;深夜=素色真丝长袖寝袍(换时间线换装,场景优先)。本集中文:落水(汉越词lạc thủy伏笔,E10金手指回收)。'一个也不认识'指认字(合规,读写为零已立),非听力禁句。

shots.content: The sweet young Chinese maid with straight bangs and a low ponytail in her plain dark-grey buttoned servant uniform with white collar, completely ALONE in the frame, NO other person, NO foreground figure — stepping forward anxiously with both hands pressed together in an earnest pleading gesture, speaking quickly with worried sincere eyes toward the camera, dim opulent mansion study behind her, single face in frame. Cinematic medium close-up. Landscape.

captions.local: Giây phút nguy cấp, Tiểu Đào lên tiếng

captions.pinyin: tài tai luò shuǐ shí zhuàng de
captions.local: Phu nhân ngã xuống nước bị va đấy ạ
Tiểu Đào đang che chở cho tôi

shots.content: Close-up of the tall coldly handsome young Chinese man in a dark charcoal suit, completely ALONE in the frame, NO other person, NO foreground figure — staring hard with unreadable narrowed eyes angled slightly past the camera, jaw tight, then a faint cold acceptance settling on his face, dim opulent mansion study, warm lamplight. Cinematic close-up. Landscape.

captions.local: Cố Yến Từ nhìn cô chằm chằm ba giây
Thân xác này, đâu đâu cũng là bẫy

shots.content: Night scene: the stunningly beautiful young Chinese woman now wearing a MODEST IVORY SILK NIGHT ROBE with long sleeves and a high wrapped neckline (fully covered, elegant, NOT revealing), long loose black hair over her shoulders, completely ALONE in the frame, NO other person — sitting at an ornate carved wooden vanity table lit by a single warm candle, carefully sliding open a small drawer and searching inside it with a cautious alert expression, an antique bronze mirror behind her reflecting only darkness, single face in frame. Cinematic medium close-up. Landscape.

captions.local: Đêm khuya, cô không ngủ được

captions.zh: 偷偷翻开原主的梳妆台
captions.local: lén lút lục bàn trang điểm của Thanh Ngô
Biết đâu tìm được manh mối

shots.content: Extreme close-up at night: slender pale female fingers emerging from an ivory silk sleeve lifting a HALF-BURNED old photograph out of a dark wooden drawer — the photo shows the faded blurred figure of a young woman standing in a garden, the other half of the photo charred black and crumbling, warm single-candle light, dust motes, no face of the holder visible, absolutely no other person. Cinematic macro shot. Landscape.

captions.local: một tấm ảnh bị cháy mất một nửa

shots.content: Extreme close-up at night: the BACK of a half-burned old photograph held between slender pale female fingertips from an ivory silk sleeve — on the yellowed paper back there is ONE line of faded handwritten Chinese ink characters, artistically blurred and soft so the writing is not clearly readable, the burned edge charred and curling, warm candlelight from the side, deep shadows, no face visible, absolutely no other person. Cinematic macro shot. Landscape.

captions.local: Mặt sau tấm ảnh có một dòng chữ

captions.zh: 这些字，我一个也不认识
captions.local: Những chữ này, tôi không đọc được chữ nào
Dòng chữ ấy rốt cuộc viết gì
